scripts.build: cd frontend && tsc && vite build && node ../scripts/check_frontend_bundle.mjs
scripts.tauri:dev:llamacpp: bash scripts/generate_tauri_overrides.sh llamacpp && tauri dev --config backend/tauri.override.json -- --no-default-features --features "llamacpp runtime-libsql"
scripts.tauri:dev:mlx: bash scripts/generate_tauri_overrides.sh mlx && tauri dev --config backend/tauri.override.json -- --no-default-features --features "mlx runtime-libsql"
scripts.tauri:dev:vllm: bash scripts/generate_tauri_overrides.sh vllm && tauri dev --config backend/tauri.override.json -- --no-default-features --features "vllm runtime-libsql"
scripts.tauri:dev:ollama: bash scripts/generate_tauri_overrides.sh ollama && tauri dev --config backend/tauri.override.json -- --no-default-features --features "ollama runtime-libsql"
scripts.tauri:build:llamacpp: bash scripts/generate_tauri_overrides.sh llamacpp && tauri build --config backend/tauri.override.json -- --no-default-features --features "llamacpp runtime-libsql"
scripts.tauri:build:mlx: bash scripts/generate_tauri_overrides.sh mlx && tauri build --config backend/tauri.override.json -- --no-default-features --features "mlx runtime-libsql"
scripts.tauri:build:vllm: bash scripts/generate_tauri_overrides.sh vllm && tauri build --config backend/tauri.override.json -- --no-default-features --features "vllm runtime-libsql"
scripts.tauri:build:ollama: bash scripts/generate_tauri_overrides.sh ollama && tauri build --config backend/tauri.override.json -- --no-default-features --features "ollama runtime-libsql"
scripts.tauri:build:cloud: bash scripts/generate_tauri_overrides.sh none && tauri build --config backend/tauri.override.json -- --no-default-features --features runtime-postgres
scripts.tauri:build:cloud:unsigned: DISABLE_UPDATER_ARTIFACTS=1 bash scripts/generate_tauri_overrides.sh none && tauri build --config backend/tauri.override.json -- --no-default-features --features runtime-postgres
scripts.validate:packaging: npm run validate:naming && npm run test:setup:all && npm run test:release-manifest && bash scripts/validate_packaging_readiness.sh
scripts.validate:sidecars:llamacpp: INCLUDE_CHROMIUM=1 bash scripts/generate_tauri_overrides.sh llamacpp && npm run validate:sidecars
scripts.contracts:generate: cd ../.. && cargo run -p thinclaw-runtime-contracts --features schema --example export_contracts -- generate
scripts.contracts:check: cd ../.. && cargo run -p thinclaw-runtime-contracts --features schema --example export_contracts -- check
scripts.test:performance: cd frontend && vitest run src/lib/performance-budgets.test.ts src/lib/thinclaw-event-buffer.test.ts src/lib/thinclaw-timeline.test.ts
scripts.test:backend: cd backend && cargo test --no-default-features --features "llamacpp runtime-postgres" -- --skip web_search
scripts.test:backend:all-engines: cd backend && cargo test --no-default-features --features "llamacpp runtime-postgres" -- --skip web_search && cargo test --no-default-features --features "mlx runtime-postgres" -- engine && cargo test --no-default-features --features "vllm runtime-postgres" -- engine && cargo test --no-default-features --features "ollama runtime-postgres" -- engine
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup:chromium && npm run setup:ai && npm run validate:sidecars:llamacpp
scripts.lint:ts: cd frontend && tsc --noEmit && cd .. && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.e2e.json
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:fmt && npm run lint:thinclaw && npm run lint:ts
scripts.ci: npm run lint:all && npm run test:thinclaw
